meta.title: Activation network — FR entities + key persons + warm bridges
meta.disclaimer: Public Output: stakeholder + proximity only. Voucher identities never rendered. Method tab documents how to replicate. Private overlay holds L1/L2 edges and may declare default L2 via trusted vouchers without naming them.

enrichment.atlasGap: Atlas had ~119 entities but only 3 person entities — this file is the activation people layer.
enrichment.southernEuropePass: Exa 2026-07-19 — FR GP gaps + ES/IT/PT funds, people, theses, portfolios

targets.why: Motier founding partner — Mission case programme ownership.
targets.desiredAsk: Warm intro via your L1s to confirm La Maison / portfolio programme owner; cohort workshop design chat.
targets.killCriteria: No programme owner after 2 warm attempts.

verifySteps.sharedConnectionsHint: Look for Motier / La Maison / portfolio founders among Shared connections.
verifySteps.introAskDraft: Short intro to confirm who owns La Maison / portfolio founder programmes — want a cohort evaluation workshop design chat, not a brand ask.

targets.why: AI Partner Elaia — path via Sofia (ex-Elaia) already in private graph.
targets.desiredAsk: Technical portfolio mobilisation / evaluation workshop design.

verifySteps.sharedConnectionsHint: Prefer vouchers with Elaia alumni or AI portfolio overlap.
verifySteps.introAskDraft: Intro for a short call on how Elaia mobilises AI portfolio founders for technical evaluation workshops.

targets.why: Kima MP — seed velocity + AI density.
targets.desiredAsk: Who can convene technical founders from portfolio.

verifySteps.sharedConnectionsHint: Prefer Kima portfolio founders or seed peers who know Jean directly.
verifySteps.introAskDraft: Who can convene technical founders from the Kima portfolio for a small session — not a pitch for credits.

targets.why: Campus programmes — path via Pénélope (Noël FT) / Corentin (Station F).

verifySteps.sharedConnectionsHint: Prefer Station F / French Tech programme operators among Shared connections.
verifySteps.introAskDraft: Intro to programme leads who mobilise technical founders (not logo / campus tour).

verifySteps.sharedConnectionsHint: Prefer Partech portfolio or seed founders with a real tie to Romain.
verifySteps.introAskDraft: Intro to platform/portfolio engagement owner OR a short technical portfolio session design chat.

targets.why: ISAI — Pierre Hébrard’s Series A lead; concrete founder→investor bridge.
targets.desiredAsk: Warm intro via Pierre to the ISAI partner who owns founder programmes / portfolio engagement.
targets.killCriteria: Intro stays fundraising-only with no activation angle.

targets.desiredAsk: How Serena Squad mobilises AI founders.

targets.why: Eurazeo VC MD — closes FR fund people gap; AI venture channel.
targets.desiredAsk: Who owns portfolio technical engagement for AI companies.
targets.killCriteria: PE-only conversation with no venture path.

targets.why: Korelya CEO — EU↔Asia AI scale-up bridge.
targets.desiredAsk: Intro to portfolio / platform owner for applied AI founders.
targets.killCriteria: Asia-only BD with no FR founder mobilisation.

targets.why: Primary Spain growth AI activation target.
targets.desiredAsk: Warm path to Seaya AI portfolio mobilisation owner.
targets.killCriteria: No Iberia activation angle after 2 attempts.

verifySteps.sharedConnectionsHint: Prefer Iberia / Seaya portfolio founders among Shared connections.
verifySteps.introAskDraft: Intro for a short chat on how Seaya mobilises AI / deeptech founders — not a fundraising ask.

targets.desiredAsk: Technical founder convening from K Fund portfolio.

targets.why: Italy CDP AI fund programme adjacency.
targets.desiredAsk: Who runs AI fund founder programmes / technical activation.
Portfolio founder mobilisation for evaluation workshops.
